articles.title: Authorities look into possible vandalism of expensive geotubes on Nantucket
articles.description:
Photos show the geotubes, which help shield a vulnerable stretch of Sconset Bluff, cut open, and a private investigator believes the damage was deliberate.

The post Authorities look into possible vandalism of expensive geotubes on Nantucket appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Authorities investigate vandalism of geotubes protecting Sconset Bluff on Nantucket.
Photos reveal geotubes cut open, suggesting deliberate damage by an unknown party.
Potential consequences include increased erosion risks for Nantucket's coastal properties.

articles.title: ICE detains Marlborough 14-year-old, apparently as ‘hostage’ to target her father, Rep. Trahan says
articles.description:
The teenage girl was apparently used to bait her father during an "overnight attempt," Rep. Lori Trahan said.

The post ICE detains Marlborough 14-year-old, apparently as ‘hostage’ to target her father, Rep. Trahan says appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: ICE detained a 14-year-old girl in Marlborough to target her father, Rep. Lori Trahan.
The incident occurred during an overnight operation, raising concerns about family safety.
Rep. Trahan condemned the action, highlighting its impact on local immigrant communities.

articles.title: Mass. woman among victims in Utah triple homicide; fundraiser launched for husband
articles.description:
Easthampton resident Natalie Graves was killed while hiking with her aunt as the suspect was fleeing an earlier murder, authorities say.

The post Mass. woman among victims in Utah triple homicide; fundraiser launched for husband appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Easthampton resident Natalie Graves was killed in a Utah triple homicide while hiking.
Graves was hiking with her aunt when the suspect fled from an earlier murder.
A fundraiser has been launched to support Graves' husband during this tragedy.

articles.title: Here’s what to know about the new $1 billion Gillette headquarters planned for Fort Point
articles.description:
The company explored leasing space elsewhere or staying put on its South Boston campus but opted instead for a brand-new building next door.

The post Here’s what to know about the new $1 billion Gillette headquarters planned for Fort Point appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Gillette plans to build a new $1 billion headquarters in Fort Point, South Boston.
The new building will replace their existing campus, enhancing local business opportunities.
Construction is expected to create hundreds of jobs for Boston residents.

articles.title: 4 things to know about new Patriots edge rusher Dre’Mont Jones
articles.description:
He has Ohio State and Tennessee Titans ties, but did not overlap with Mike Vrabel with either program.

The post 4 things to know about new Patriots edge rusher Dre’Mont Jones appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Patriots signed edge rusher Dre'Mont Jones to strengthen their defense.
Jones previously played for Ohio State and the Tennessee Titans.
His addition aims to enhance the Patriots' pass rush in the upcoming season.
